name: Example Intrinsic
desc: n/a

name: Not Just a Flanker
desc: You're more than your more common cousins. Whenever you Bait an Interceptor or EWO, gain Closure -- Meld if they're a Flanker

name: Made to Flank
desc: Exploiting vulnerabilities is your jam. Whenever an Ally Overwatches or Baits, gain +1 while they do. This does not stack multiple times.

name: LGG Rivalry
desc: You've got a chip on your shoulder about not having a pound for air to ground. Whenever you Bait a Multirole, gain Lock On -- gain Lock On and Closure if it's a Multirole or Strike Eagle instead.

name: Based Platform
desc: Whenever you face a malus, you may spend a Nerve and a Capacity to gain Snapshot. If you got the malus from an Eagle, ignore the Nerve spend. Exhaust.

name: Falconer
desc: Handling birds is much like being a snake charmer. As a 1E - REACT, whenever someone else in a Viper Faces Consequences, you may give them +1 Forward.

name: Jungle Warrior
desc: You're born to fight things down low and in the heat of it. Whenever you attack a helicopter or plane with STOL or VTOL, gain Closure.

name: Hunter
desc: Whenever you roll A2A to attack a small craft, gain +1 Forward.

name: Big Game Hunter
desc: Whenever you deal damage to a massive target (sorry, future AWACS, define massive yourself), deal +1 Survivability damage to them.

name: Thrush Thrasher
desc: You may spend a Capacity to reach a very high altitude. While up there, you gain Lock on or Closure every turn during your POS, but you lose -2 Manvuerability.

name: Dorito Drifter
desc: [REACT - 1] Set your Speed to -1 until the end of your next turn. If you do, add your base Speed to your Manuverability.

name: Pivot Point
desc: Whenever you make a Manuverability Check, you may reroll one of the dice. Exhaust.

name: Avengers Assembled
desc: Whenever an ally ground unit is endangered, you may burn a Temper. If you do, gain a Guaranteed Mixed Success.Snapshot.

name: Treetop Tightrope
desc: Whenever flying low would cause you to make a Check, you may burn a Nerve and pass it instead.

name: Silver Bullet
desc: At the start of a mission, your AWACS chooses one enemy. You deal double damage to them.

name: Don't Say It
desc: Whenever someone quotes or references a pop culture icon, you or them may spend 1 Energy. You gain Lock On if either does.

name: I Am Become
desc: You're one with your plane. Ignore your first Survivability Damage by burning one of each Pilot Stat.

name: Impassioned Defense
desc: The first time in a Mission an Ally loses Survivability, you Gain a Guaranteed Mixed Success Snapshot.

name: Midway Design
desc: Gain [x] from the Family Techniques of the Pantheras as a Maneuver.

name: Midway Design
desc: Gain [x] from the Family Techniques of the Mirages as a Maneuver.

name: Ejection Pit
desc: You no longer have to Burn a Coin whenever you Enter a Critical State through Fixing or Risking the Odds, but immediately eject.

name: Supersonic Stick
desc: At the start of your turn, you may make a Speed Test. If you Pass, gain an additional Maneuver this turn.

name: Bullheaded
desc: Burn a Nerve or a Temper. If you burn a Nerve, give an ally Lock On. If you burn a Temper, gain Closure.

name: High Noon
desc: You know the best time to draw. You may burn a Reflex, Nerve, and Capacity -- the sun is now at your back. Negate the first Consequences you face this turn. Exhaust.

name: You Are Not Prepared
desc: Whenever you have a midflight update, choose Titans or Demons. If you choose Titans, recover a Survivability; if you choose Demons, recover a Temper and a G-Resist. Exhaust.

name: Leaf Dancing
desc: Light like a leaf on the wind. You may let yourself be jostled by the forces around yourself and Face Appropriate Consequences -- but gain +1 Manuverability and Speed for two turns. Exhaust.

name: Evil Eye
desc: The first time you go on Overwatch each mission, you choose Pain or Gain. If you choose Pain, take a Survivability Damage and gain Meld. If you choose Gain, Mark a Deployment Advancement and either Escalate thrice or let the AWACS hold Disadvantage on you.

name: Channelling
desc: You're not immune to digging trenches, but you know how to make sure that only your kin can follow you past them. You gain a +1 Forward against consequences when you Bait aircraft that aren't Windstorms, Sveabirds, or Mirages.

name: Pitting
desc: Your aptitude at creating pits means you're equally skilled at avoiding their faults. [REACT - 1] Mitigate Consequences caused by your own Ordnance. Exhaust.

name: Seabird of Prey
desc: Whenever you see an island, you may make an ass of yourself by asking what fucking island. Gain an Ambiguous Boon.

name: Cola Lover
desc: Though you're a rebellious spirit, you know to listen to your superior officers at times. Whenever your AWACS patches your base commander into your communications, gain Meld.

name: Monsoon Warning
desc: Whenever the winds are about to turn for worse, you know how to prepare. A turn after a mid-mission update, choose Stained Time or Soul's DNA. If you choose Stained Time, Suffer E3 Consequences but gain an extra turn; if you choose Soul's DNA, unexhaust a Maneuver.

name: Lead Sled
desc: You may give yourself a minor injury during flight. If you do, take -1 Forward, but gain 1 Energy. You can only gain the mechanical benefits twice per mission.

name: Holding Hands
desc: At the start of the mission, choose Classical or Historical. If you choose classical, your rich family gives you a 2 Energy boost at the start of a mission; if you choose historical, your nerdery gives you Meld (Pilot Stat Check). Exhaust.

name: Wonder Wall
desc: Choose Noel or Niel. If you choose Noel, your christmas spirit gifts 1 Capacity to any ally. If you choose Niel, Gain an Ambiguous Boon. Exhaust.

name: Tailgunner
desc: Whenever you take Survivability damage, you may deal 1 damage back to whatever dealt it.
